flow: open map-click sketch drawing for 森林左翼線
place two sketch points on the deployment frontage preview
verify 戦線描画 2/5, one draft polyline, two draft points, and enabled 描画確定
press 1点戻す and verify 戦線描画 1/5, one draft point, no draft polyline, and disabled 描画確定
add two more points and confirm a three-point saved sketch line
press 既存線を編集 and verify the existing three points load back as draft points
add a fourth point and confirm a four-point saved sketch line
save a standing-order plan set and open 内容確認

fourPointConfirm.saveNote: 計画セット保存時に戦線形状 1線を含める。

planSetPreview.contentPreviewIncludes: 保存戦線形状 森林左翼線 4点
